title: Sequential smFISH
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6437e","text":"We have developed a multiplexed single molecule FISH protocol for use at the Institute. This protocol was optimized on human tissue, but will work on mouse tissue as well. It was adapted from Lyubimova et. al., Nature Protocols, 2013. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"fvfvq","text":"Ensure that all reagents are in recombinant and RNAse-free format, as we have noticed RNA degradation in solutions that contain enzymes derived from whole organisms. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bap6o","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9me68","text":"We filter every solution with a 0.2um syringe filter prior to use. This reduces background spots and dust that interfere with imaging of diffraction limited spots. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a3ubu","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"65gg0","text":"For the SDS treatment after fixation and permeabilization, be gentle when dropping SDS onto the section, as well as during washes. This treatment is relatively harsh and the tissue must be treated somewhat delicately. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: 10-14 um cryosections are taken from fresh-frozen tissue, which are collected on poly-lysinetreated #1 coverslips at room temperature (RT). After 5-10 min at RT, sections are placed at 4°C until sectioning is complete. At that point, proceed immediately to fixation and permeabilization. 00:05:00, RT
Post-fix sections for 15 min with 4% PFA @ 4 °C. 4% PFA Contributed by users 00:15:00, Post-fixing Undetermined, Post-fixing
Wash with PBS (1/3) PBS Contributed by users
Wash with PBS (2/3) PBS Contributed by users
Wash with PBS (3/3) PBS Contributed by users
Permeabilize with cold methanol at -20 C for 10 min. Undetermined, Permeabilizing 00:10:00, Permeabilizing
Air dry for 30 min in fume hood (Stopping point: store coverslips at -80C) 00:30:00, Air drying
Optional: Treat sections with 8% SDS/PBS for 10 minutes, followed by 3 – 5 rinses with PBSor 2XSSC 00:10:00
Add 2ml 2X SSC 2X SSC Contributed by users undetermined, 2X SSC
Pre-heat hyb oven to 37 °C Undetermined, oven
Place sections in hyb buffer without probes.
Add 4 ul probe 400ul hyb buffer. undetermined, probe undetermined, hyb buffer Specific to 6-well plate format – if using perfusion chamber, this volume can be reduced.
Incubate at 37 C for 2H. Undetermined, Incubation 02:00:00, Incubation
Add 2 ml wash buffer to each well. undetermined, wash buffer
Incubate at 37 C for 15 min. Undetermined, Incubation 00:15:00, Incubation
Remove wash buffer.
Add 2 ml fresh wash buffer and incubate at 37 C for 15 min. undetermined, wash buffer Undetermined, Incubation 00:15:00, Incubation
Replace wash buffer with fresh wash buffer + DAPI (final 5ug/mL) and incubate at 37 C for 15 min. Undetermined, Incubation 00:15:00, Incubation
GLOX buffer step if performing antibody stain
Mount and image or store at 4 C in 2XSSC until imaging session Undetermined 2X SSC Contributed by users
65% formamide/2X SSC, 10 min X 3, 30 C 65% formamide/2X SSC Contributed by users 00:10:00 Undetermined
Wash in 2XSSC (1/3)
Wash in 2XSSC (2/3)
Wash in 2XSSC (3/3)
Following stripping, proceed to hybridization step. go to step #10
creator: Stephanie Mok
